sellers_note: ELEGANT, POWERFUL, INNOVATIVE, REFINED, SPACIOUS, NO-ACCIDENT, ONE-OWNER, OFF-LEASE, NONSMOKER, EXHILARATING! The 2023 Tesla Model X AWD is a premium electric SUV with dual motor all-wheel drive delivering instant torque, exceptional acceleration, and confident handling. It combines cutting-edge electric performance with a large cabin, advanced technology, and a smooth, silent ride that embodies Tesla's mission to ''accelerate the world's transition to sustainable energy.'' In a class that includes luxury SUVs like the Audi e-Tron and Mercedes-Benz EQC, the Model X stands out for its long range, advanced Supercharger network access, and unique combination of performance and utility, making it a compelling choice for drivers who want both capability and innovation. Critics did not just review this SUV, they became believers in its electric performance and futuristic design. Basic Vehicle Limited Warranty Active until 01/14/2027 or 50,000 total miles, whichever comes first Battery and Drive Unit Warranty Active until 01/14/2031 or 150,000 total miles, whichever comes first Supplemental Restraint System (SRS) Warranty Active until 01/14/2028 or 60,000 total miles, whichever comes first Want to extend its warranty coverage? In most cases, we can provide expanded options to cover each vehicle with a valuable, comprehensive warranty for years to come! This Model X AWD is packed with excellent features out of the factory that support both performance and comfort, including an advanced dual motor all-wheel drive setup, a large panoramic windshield for expansive views, and a rangy battery pack that delivers long driving distances on a single charge. Tesla enhances this vehicle further with thoughtfully selected installed features that elevate functionality, comfort, and style beyond the baseline. Factory Installed Features White & Black Premium Interior -- A modern, upscale cabin design with contrasting tones Yoke Steering Wheel -- Futuristic steering control that opens up the dash view 20'' Cyberstream Wheels -- Adds sleek visual appeal and balanced handling stance Horsepower -- Estimated at approximately 670 total system horsepower for strong electric acceleration Charging Times Tesla Supercharger V3 Network Adds up to 200 miles of range in about 15 minutes under optimal conditions Level 2 Home Charger (240V) Adds approximately 30 to 44 miles of range per hour of charging Standard 120V Outlet Adds roughly 3 to 5 miles of range per hour of charging Mechanically, the Tesla Model X AWD uses dual electric motors and a high-capacity battery pack to provide instant torque, smooth acceleration, and consistent power delivery without a traditional transmission. This electric drivetrain eliminates gear shifts and reduces mechanical complexity, resulting in a responsive and refined driving feel. On the exterior, the Model X's design blends aerodynamic efficiency with SUV practicality. The 20'' Cyberstream wheels complement its sleek profile, while the large panoramic windshield and falcon wing rear doors add visual distinction and practicality. Infotainment and electronics center around Tesla's large touchscreen interface, which controls navigation, media, climate, and vehicle settings. Enhanced connectivity features such as navigation, live traffic data, and streaming (may require subscription) provide a technologically rich experience.
